notes: Zapier polls Odoo's XML-RPC/JSON-RPC API. Odoo also supports server-side automated actions that POST to a URL — those would be the webhook pattern in OpenFn — but Zapier does not use them.

triggers.name: New Contact
triggers.description: Fires when a new contact (res.partner) is created.

triggers.name: New Lead
triggers.description: Fires when a new lead (crm.lead) is created.
